title: ayenia parviflora
intro: Ayenia parviflora, also known as Mexican stonebreaker or small-flowered ayenia, is a flowering plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Ayenia parviflora has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Ayenia parviflora include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support health and well-being.
